ddls:
CREATE TABLE "delivery_offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery office */,
  "post_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the delivery office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery office */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the delivery office is located */,
  "destination_facility" TEXT /* Name of the destination facility where the items are delivered */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the office to handle deliveries */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the main contact person at the office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the office */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the office */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographical latitude of the office */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographical longitude of the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_load_devices" (
  "uld_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each ULD */,
  "uld_type" TEXT /* Type of ULD (e.g., pallet, container) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the ULD in terms of weight or volume */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ULD (e.g., available, in use, maintenance) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the ULD */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the ULD was purchased */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uld_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery being logged */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., dispatch, arrival, delivery) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery at the time of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the activity */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
